topic: Remains of a woman are found by a young boy; Forensic examin.

framework.structure: ['The [specific place/object/event] that'] + [Mundane description] + ['is actually hiding'] + [Forbidden or suppressed truth]
framework.trigger: Hidden reality — the world has a concealed layer that almost nobody sees
framework.example: The town in Norway where it is illegal to die is not a tourist quirk. It is covering up something much stranger.

script.hook: The town in Norway where it is illegal to die is not a tourist quirk. It is covering up something much stranger.
script.body: Scientists have no explanation for this. The data exists, the phenomenon is documented, but the answer has never been found.
script.cta: Comment KNEW if you already knew this.

full_script_text: The town in Norway where it is illegal to die is not a tourist quirk. It is covering up something much stranger. Scientists have no explanation for this. The data exists, the phenomenon is documented, but the answer has never been found. Comment KNEW if you already knew this.
